title: Volcano Escape Quiz

questions.prompt: What is melted rock called while it is still under the ground?
questions.hint: It becomes lava only after it reaches the surface.

questions.prompt: What is melted rock called after it reaches the surface?
Which part is the opening at the top of many volcanoes?
What can escape during an eruption?
questions.hint: Think of hot rock and material thrown into the air.

questions.prompt: Where does magma collect before it rises through a volcano?
questions.hint: The word chamber means a storage space.

questions.prompt: What is the path magma travels through called in this lesson?
questions.hint: It is the route up through the volcano.

questions.prompt: Which event usually happens first in the eruption sequence?
Why can an ash cloud be dangerous?
options: It can make air hard to breathe
It turns all rocks into ice
questions.answer: It can make air hard to breathe
questions.hint: Tiny pieces in the air can affect breathing and visibility.

questions.prompt: Which statement best compares magma and lava?
options: They are melted rock in different places
They are two names for ash
Magma is cold and lava is ice
questions.answer: They are melted rock in different places

questions.prompt: How can lava change the land after an eruption?
options: It can cool and become new rock
It can turn into ocean water only
questions.answer: It can cool and become new rock

questions.prompt: Which label belongs closest to the underground melted rock storage area?
Which label belongs near material moving down the side of the volcano?
Which explanation is the most precise?
options: Pressure can push magma upward through a vent
Lava is melted rock before it erupts
questions.answer: Pressure can push magma upward through a vent
questions.hint: Look for the statement that matches the eruption sequence.

questions.prompt: A scientist says, 'The same melted rock changed names.' What do they probably mean?
options: Magma became lava at the surface
questions.answer: Magma became lava at the surface
questions.hint: The name changes when the melted rock comes out.

questions.prompt: Which set of labels best fits a simple volcano cross-section?
options: Magma chamber, vent, crater, lava flow, ash cloud
questions.answer: Magma chamber, vent, crater, lava flow, ash cloud
questions.hint: Choose the set from the volcano diagram.
